---
title: "Title"
author: "Janis Sonnemann"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    css: wide-output.css
    toc: yes
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes
    toc_depth: 3
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
knit: (function(input, ...) {JanisHelpers::knit_exp_structure(input, format = "html_document")})
---

```{r setup, include = knitr::is_html_output(), error = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
# Before start save the file to location in experiment that is being analysed

# set format and resolution of figure outputs
fig.format <- "png"
fig.res <- 300

####DO NOT CHANGE---- 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = paste0("output/", xfun::sans_ext(basename(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path)), "/figs/", Sys.Date(),"/"), 
  dev = fig.format, 
  dpi = fig.res, 
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 5, 
  fig.height = 5,
  # hides code in pdf file
  echo = knitr::is_html_output()
)
####----

# extract path of experiment, use this in addition to here to refer to experiment data
exp_path <- rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path |> 
  dirname() |> 
  dirname()

library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(JanisHelpers)

```
